title: Galactic Fair
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Holiday |prev=[[Shaldania Parade]]{{JournalCite|5|Galaxywide NewsNets}} |conc= |next= |image= |name=Galactic Fair
Imperial Fair |observedby=[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] |significance= |celebrations= |observances= |place= |begin= |end= |date= }} The '''Galactic Fair''' (called the '''Imperial Fair''' in the [[Imperial Era/Legends|reign]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]) was the highlight of [[Fete Week]], and was a traditional fair held annually on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. The Fair was held along [[Glitannai Esplanade]] and incorporated dancing, acrobatics, shopping, technology exhibits, food pavilions, and a massive parade of military might. From the surrounding spires, thousands watched as the parade ended in ''[[Pliada di am Imperium]]''. There, at the base of the [[Imperial Palace/Legends|Imperial Palace]], dignitaries would bestow blessings on the crowd from an open-air balcony. The Galactic Fair was also the site of the [[Grand Display]], which included exhibits created by various [[Planet/Legends|planetary]] governments. ==Appearances== *''[[Rebel Force: Hostage]]'' {{Mo}} *{{JournalCite|5|Galaxywide NewsNets}} {{ID|Imperial Fair}} *''[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force]]'' {{Mo}} ==Sources== *''[[Coruscant and the Core Worlds]]'' *{{SonyCite|url=en_US/players/content.vm?id=66709&resource=features|text=Friday Feature - Holiday Player Events Guide}} *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} [[Category:Galactic Empire holidays]] [[Category:Galactic Republic holidays]]
